<!-- BEGIN LATTIX GENERATED AGENT STANDARDS
Source: LATTIX-IO/lattix-monorepo:.github/prompts/lattix-feature.prompt.md
Bundle: 2026.05.05
Do not edit this file directly. Update the canonical source in lattix-monorepo and run scripts/sync-agent-standards.ps1.
END LATTIX GENERATED AGENT STANDARDS -->
Implement the requested feature for Lattix.

Follow Lattix standards:
- Prefer small, reviewable diffs.
- Preserve existing behavior unless explicitly changed.
- Use TDD when practical: tests first, implementation second.
- Keep domain logic pure and isolate IO in adapters.
- Validate inputs, fail closed, avoid unsafe defaults, and never log secrets/PII.
- Add structured logs, metrics, traces, or health checks when relevant.
- Update docs/config/ADR when behavior, architecture, rollout, or operations change.

Process:
1. Inspect existing patterns before adding new ones.
2. State assumptions briefly.
3. Propose target files/tree.
4. Add or update tests.
5. Implement the smallest safe diff.
6. Include verification commands.
7. Provide risks, rollout, rollback, and PR checklist.

Return:
Summary; files changed; tests; implementation notes; docs/config/observability; commands; risks/rollout/rollback.
